text: MSP: Paddy (Common). Kharif 2024-25. MSP: ₹2,300/quintal. Previous: ₹2,183. Increase: 5.4%. Cost of production: ₹1,455. Returns over cost: 58%. CACP recommends MSP based on A2+FL cost formula.
MSP: Wheat. Rabi 2024-25. MSP: ₹2,275/quintal. Previous: ₹2,125. Increase: 7.1%. Government procured 26.2 MT wheat at MSP. Punjab, Haryana, MP top procurement states.
MSP: Cotton (Long Staple). Kharif 2024-25. MSP: ₹7,020/quintal. Previous: ₹6,620. Increase: 6%. CCI is nodal procurement agency. Maharashtra and Gujarat key procurement regions.
MSP: Tur/Arhar Dal. Kharif 2024-25. MSP: ₹7,550/quintal. Previous: ₹7,000. Increase: 7.9%. NAFED procures under PM-AASHA scheme. Import duty adjusted to manage domestic prices.
MSP: Mustard. Rabi 2024-25. MSP: ₹5,650/quintal. Previous: ₹5,450. Increase: 3.7%. Rajasthan largest producer. Key oilseed for edible oil self-sufficiency mission. NAFED procurement.
MSP (FRP): Sugarcane. 2024-25. Fair & Remunerative Price: ₹340/quintal. Previous: ₹315. Increase: 7.9%. States set SAP (State Advised Price) above FRP. UP SAP: ₹400/quintal. CCEA fixes sugarcane FRP.
